items.title: Rare Earth Boom: Defense Heavyweight Joins Critical Mineral Effort
items.description: REalloys Inc. appoints GM Defense president Stephen S. duMont as non-executive chairman to align commercial growth with allied defense modernization and secure critical mineral supply chains.

items.title: Strong Day for Market Indexes - AAPL at New All-Time High
items.description: Apple (AAPL) stock rose +3.94% today to $262 per share -- its highest close ever, and the first such all-time closing high since late 2024.

items.title: Boeing (BA) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
items.description: Boeing (BA) closed the most recent trading day at $216.82, moving +1.82% from the previous trading session.

items.title: These Stocks Moved the Most Today: Apple, Amazon, TSMC, Cleveland-Cliffs, Super Micro, Cooper Cos., Tesla, Netflix, and More
items.description: Apple stock rises after analysts at Loop Capital boost their rating on the iPhone maker to Buy from Hold, while Nvidia unveils the first Blackwell wafer made in the U.S. with a chip produced by Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing.

items.title: Boeing Given Go Ahead to Up Production. What It Means for the Stock.
items.description: Friday, the Federal Aviation Administration lifted the cap on production of the plane to 42 per month from 38.
